title: PokeMath active question-bank manifest pointer v1
description: The operator's rollback lever (M3, #13): names the active approval manifest by Cocos resources path. Repointing this file at the previous manifest restores it without touching immutable bank artifacts. The runtime parser (shared/question-bank-manifest.ts, parseActiveManifestPointer) is the authority; this schema mirrors it for editors and CI.

manifest.description: Cocos resources path of the active manifest, no extension (e.g. question-banks/manifest.v1).
